articles.author: Holly Riordan
articles.title: A Vegas Entertainer Is Suing Taylor Swift Over 'The Life of a Showgirl' - Complex
articles.description: Maren Wade, who appeared on ‘America’s Got Talent,’ filed a trademark lawsuit claiming Swift’s album title overlaps with her own showgirl brand.
articles.content: Maren Wade, a Las Vegas performer, is suing Taylor Swift for trademark infringement. Wade claims that The Life of a Showgirl album and its merch are too similar to the brand that shes cultivated over… [+1831 chars]

articles.title: Like ‘driving to San Francisco and back, every week’: In rural America, cancer patients face tall hurdles to get care - cnn.com
articles.description: As cancer care becomes both more advanced and more specialized, options in rural areas have shrunk.
